name: bookkeeping-agent
description: SQLite-backed double-entry ledger for the bookkeeping agent

scripts.web: npm run build --prefix web && tsx server/server.ts
scripts.test: tsx --test test/ledger.test.ts test/ingestion.test.ts test/receipt_ocr.test.ts test/categorization.test.ts test/reporting.test.ts test/policy_yaml.test.ts test/reconciliation.test.ts test/invoicing.test.ts test/web_server.test.ts
